_template_note: Cherry Studio persists MCP servers in Local Storage LevelDB under redux key persist:cherry-studio -> mcp.servers. This sanitized record is the intended AgentCore enrollment shape. The bearer is materialized from Windows User env BIFROST_MCP_VIRTUAL_KEY by scripts/cherry/enroll_agentcore_gateway.py because Cherry does not expand ${env:} in headers. Never commit a resolved bearer.
name: agentcore-gateway
